channel.title: TechLoom Blog
channel.description: SRE insights, code quality tips, and startup tech advice from a senior site reliability engineer with 10+ years of enterprise experience.

item.title: Does Temperature Actually Matter? 720 Runs Say Not Really
item.description: I swept temperature from 0.0 to 1.0 across 6 coding tasks with 30 repetitions each. The total spread in quality was 0.9 points on a 100-point scale.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: I Ran 540 Benchmarks to Prove CLAUDE.md Compression Works. The Data Had Other Plans.
item.description: I built an open-source benchmark to test whether compressing CLAUDE.md improves code quality. 540 runs across 3 models and 5 profiles later, the results surprised me.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: Compress Your CLAUDE.md: Cut 60-70% of System Prompt Bloat in Claude Code
item.description: Claude Code injects CLAUDE.md into every conversation. I compressed my instruction and memory files by 60-70% by stripping human-readable formatting and keeping only machine-readable signal. Here's how.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: Why I Built a Budget App That Knows Nothing About You
item.description: Why I built Ledgr, a privacy-first open-source budget app that keeps all your financial data on your device. No cloud sync, no bank credentials, no tracking.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: How to Tell If Your AI-Generated Code Is Production-Ready
item.description: AI tools are generating tons of code, but is it production-ready? Use this 7-point checklist to evaluate your AI-generated codebase before it reaches production.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: 5 Signs Your Startup Needs a Fractional SRE
item.description: Growing pains are real, but they shouldn't crash your app. Learn the five clear signals that it's time to bring in fractional SRE expertise.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)

item.title: MVP Development: Build vs Buy in 2026
item.description: The build vs buy landscape has changed. Here's how to make the right decision for your MVP in 2026, plus the hidden costs both approaches carry.
item.author: johnathen@techloom.it (Johnathen Chilcher)
